title: ATTICUS_MPO query-aware retrieval upgrade merged baseline
content: PR #100 merged the next ATTICUS_MPO retrieval-quality pass into release-candidate. Context injection now accepts optional query-aware and task-aware hints, ranking considers query/objective overlap, preferred scope, active-pack match, baseline match, and prior scope/tag/recency fallback, and the first call-surface adoption is in AgentCoordinator.
context_summary: Durable merged milestone for the first query-aware retrieval-quality upgrade after the context-cell merge. This is now part of the active MPO memory-engine baseline.
